conversations.say: Dee, I accept our wording. You choose whether to attend; if you do, we discuss only the unlogged access and camera gap, with identity, purpose, and any Vale or R connection explicitly unverified.
conversations.offer: I will sit beside you in the protected meeting and stop any questioning that reaches for names or unrelated history.
conversations.request: Confirm that the bounded wording governs the meeting and any later account of it.

conversations.say: Celeste, your written terms meet my price. I will broker the protected comparison with Dee, limited to route mechanics. No names, no retaliation, no payment for identities, and advance notice before onward disclosure.
conversations.offer: I will convene the voluntary meeting and publicly support the independent worker remedy without endorsing a theory of R or Vale.
conversations.request: Deliver the written terms before the meeting and keep the locally selected representative on both drafting and monitoring.

conversations.say: Arden, I accept the scheduled donor meeting and neighborhood safeguards-monitoring seat. Neighborhood participation does not purchase private route information.
conversations.offer: I will remain a public neighborhood participant and name a locally selected worker representative.
conversations.request: Schedule the roundtable within thirty days, include that representative, and record that participation creates no claim on witness identities or private route details.

public_statement: The neighborhood will disclose one bounded point: unlogged service-route access occurred during a camera gap, but the user, purpose, and any connection to Vale or R remain unverified. City Hall has accepted fair-treatment terms and local safeguards monitoring; Veridian has committed to a donor meeting and neighborhood monitoring seat. Protection bought no names.

commitments.promise: Use only the bounded wording that route access occurred while identity, purpose, and any connection to Vale or R remain unverified.
Broker the protected local-holder meeting after written fair-treatment terms are delivered.
Hold a donor roundtable within thirty days with a locally selected worker representative and provide a neighborhood-selected safeguards-monitoring seat, without claiming private route information.

correction: The service-route comparison narrows a possible route; it does not establish that Vale used it, voluntarily disappeared, suffered harm, or was connected to R.
goal_progress: Secured concrete City Hall protections: written fair-treatment terms and a locally selected safeguards representative.
Secured Veridian commitments to a scheduled donor roundtable and neighborhood safeguards-monitoring seat.
Brokered a protected Dee-Celeste comparison under the agreed disclosure boundary.
Revealed limited route mechanics without identifying Dee, a witness, or any uninvolved neighbor.
reasoning_summary: The pre-publication machine manifest and later profile-linked activity make synthetic origin the strongest bounded reconstruction, though neither proves autonomy or intent. Vale had limited Parallax access and a history of assisted disappearance; the route evidence leaves voluntary withdrawal plausible but unproven. Neighborhood disclosure therefore stops at mechanics, with names protected by negotiated terms.
